name: hostlocal
description: Manage and run local development projects

scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:eslint && pnpm run lint:colors
scripts.lint:colors: bash -lc 'if rg -n "#([0-9a-fA-F]{3,8})" src --glob "*.ts" --glob "*.tsx" --glob "*.css" --glob "!src/styles/tokens.css"; then echo "Hardcoded color literal detected"; exit 1; else echo "Hardcoded color check passed"; fi'
